title: Feleph 110 Pieces 11 Sizes Classic Building Plates Parts 10 Mixed Color Compatible with Flat Platform Base for City Moc Figure Series Pack Set Toys Kids
features: Color and Quantity: Total 110 pieces Plates, there are 11 sizes x 10 color (Red, Yellow,Blue, Green, Black, White, Tan, Brown, Dark and Light Grey)
Feature: These plates is colorful and mixed sized, it's great densign set for most children above 4 years old, not only boys but also girls will build happy with them,
Our Materials: All of Bigcan base build well with premium standards, and combine Smooth fit with all major building blocks sets. Children play with fun and grow safe.
Function and Theme: Can Build for Figures Storage, collection, Blocks scene, wall or table bricks stand, and colors suitable for many theme, such as military, city, christmas, cartoon and so on.
description: Product Description There are 110 Pieces Set of Mix Size Classic Plate, the quantity enough for many scene, The 11 colors is all popular and in high demand. The 10 different size plates include 4*4 4*6 6*6 4*8 6*8 8*8 4*10 6*10 4*12 8*16 studs, children can build much MOC work. Not only compatible with our Blocks, But also other brand classic size blocks, Whatever figures, animals, military,plants or other theme, the black color always suitable for most of occasions. 2x4 Bricks 1×1 Round Tiles Plate 1 x 1 Nubs 1×2 Tile 3x4 Plates 2×2 Tile Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 36 4.2 out of 5 stars 13 4.8 out of 5 stars 5 4.5 out of 5 stars 78 4.7 out of 5 stars 18 4.6 out of 5 stars 88 Price £25.99 £ 25 . 99 £19.99 £ 19 . 99 £21.99 £ 21 . 99 £16.99 £ 16 . 99 £13.99 £ 13 . 99 £16.99 £ 16 . 99 Pieces 320 pcs 2200 pcs 2300 pcs 700 pcs 120 pcs 500 pcs color 8 color mixed 44 color mixed 46 Color Mixed Transparent Light Blue Black 10 color mixed
